blended.narrative: Mont-Sainte-Anne is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: light rain showers, highs of 49°F.
Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
